content_max_chars.description: Truncate each note's `content` to the first N characters (a preview). Omit for the full body — use this on wide scans so stacked notes can't dominate your context.

date_from.description: ISO-8601 inclusive lower bound on `created_at`. Omit to skip the lower bound.

date_to.description: ISO-8601 exclusive upper bound on `created_at`. Pass the `created_at` of the oldest note from the prior page to walk back past the result cap.

include_expired.description: Include notes whose `expires_at` has passed. Off by default so time-boxed steering retires itself.

include_general.description: Only meaningful with `skill_name`: when false, exclude the general fleet-wide notes and return the skill's own notes only.

limit.description: Max rows to return (default 20, hard cap 500).

skill_name.description: Return the notes addressed to this scout (`signals-scout-*`) plus the general (blank-target) notes for the whole fleet. Omit to browse every note on the project.
